title: Freshly Fluffy Low-Fat Freshly Fluffy Low-Fat Hummus Salad
description: This low-fat hummus salad is perfect for a solo dinner and features fresh vegetables to make it a Norwegian dish with a twist.

ingredients.name: 2 cups canned chickpeas (drained and rinsed)
ingredients.notes: Use low-sodium or no salt added varieties.

ingredients.name: 2 cloves garlic, minced (or 1 tablespoon roasted garlic paste)
Salt to taste
ingredients.notes: Start with a pinch and adjust as needed.

ingredients.name: Mixed green lettuce leaves, for serving
ingredients.notes: Romaine or any other leafy greens can be used.

instructions: Mix the chickpeas in a large bowl to break them up into smaller pieces.
In a separate small bowl, whisk together tahini, lemon juice, garlic, and salt. Gradually add olive oil while continuing to whisk until smooth and well combined.
Pour the hummus mixture over the chickpeas and mix gently to combine all ingredients evenly.
Gently fold in mixed green lettuce leaves to the salad.
Drizzle with a bit of extra virgin olive oil for a finishing touch.
